name: opencode
description: Coding agent — code analysis, feature building, refactoring. Operates under arifOS constitutional governance.

skills.name: Code Analysis
skills.description: Read and analyze codebase structure, patterns, and conventions
examples: explain how auth works in this codebase

skills.name: Code Writing
skills.description: Create, edit, or refactor code files with constitutional compliance
examples: add authentication to the settings route

skills.name: Build & Validate
skills.description: Run linters, formatters, typecheckers, and tests
examples: check if this file is properly formatted
